---
title: "LoadandUseWeatherData"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(MattiaGantFlagWeather)
```

Loads the data.

```{r}
data("Flagstaff_Weather")
head(Flagstaff_Weather)
```

Uses the data for a graph
```{r}
Flagstaff_Weather %>%
  filter(DATE >= ymd('2010/01/01')) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = DATE, y = TMAX)) +
  geom_line()
```

```{r}
Flagstaff_Weather %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = DATE, y = PRCP)) +
  geom_line()
```
```{r}
Flagstaff_Weather %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = PRCP, y = SNOW)) +
  geom_point()
```
